name: @metorial/marketstack
description: Retrieve real-time, intraday, and historical stock market data for 30,000+ tickers across 70+ global exchanges. Look up end-of-day and intraday prices, live stock quotes, commodity prices, government bond yields, ETF holdings, and stock market indices. Access company information, analyst ratings, stock splits, and dividend history. Search SEC EDGAR filings, company submissions, and XBRL financial data. Query reference data for exchanges, currencies, and timezones.
skills: look up stock splits and dividends
